title: Bolsius Fragrance Diffuser, Woody Wellness, 80 ml, Fragrance Lasts up to 8 Weeks, Contains Natural Extracts
features: Take some time out for yourself with our Bolsius True Joy Oriental Softness reed diffuser and discover the lush, calming fragrance of an oriental garden in full bloom; this reed diffuser guarantees the purest fragrance release up to 8 weeks, thanks to our ScentFusion technology

Oriental Softness is an enticing, earthy fragrance with a subtle blend of moss, sultry wood tones and a hint of orange and powdery amber; discover the lush, calming fragrance of an oriental garden in full bloom
Inspired by fragrances from nature and made with natural extracts; the rich fragrance gradually spreads through the room and lingers for a long time; for up to 8 weeks

Immerse yourself in the rich scents of True Joy, capturing the beauty of nature through vibrant colors, captivating shapes, and alluring fragrances; treat yourself to a distinctive blend of our fragrances, elegantly presented in a giftable design; crafted with ScentFusion technology, we guarantee the purest fragrance experience and the cleanest fragrance release

Since 1870, Bolsius has been making quality products to create cosiness and a warm ambience in your home; we do this with passion, skilled craftsmanship and a love for people and planet; bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that tickle the senses
description: Take some time out for yourself with our Bolsius True Joy Oriental Softness reed diffuser and discover the lush, calming fragrance of an oriental garden in full bloom. This reed diffuser guarantees the purest fragrance release up to 8 weeks, thanks to our ScentFusion technology. Our technology is a unique combination of a sophisticated fragrance blend and a plant-based formula that guarantees the optimal fragrance experience. Contains natural extracts. Our total True Joy collection includes reed diffusers and candles in various fragrances that bring extra ambiance to your home.
